novel_features.name: Dead-link detection
novel_features.description: Find archived, expired, or zero-traffic links across the workspace before they pile up. Joins local link metadata with analytics aggregates the API doesn't expose together.
novel_features.rationale: Requires a local join across links and time-bucketed analytics that no /analytics endpoint returns in one call.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Pick up cleanup work without round-tripping every link's analytics endpoint individually.

novel_features.name: Performance drift detection
novel_features.description: Detect links whose click rate dropped more than threshold percent week-over-week. Catches dying campaigns before reporting deadlines.
novel_features.rationale: Requires sequential analytics snapshots persisted locally — /analytics returns point-in-time, not deltas.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Pre-emptive alerting on silent campaign collapse — catches issues before someone notices traffic is gone.

novel_features.name: Duplicate destination finder
novel_features.description: Find every link in the workspace pointing to the same destination URL. Surfaces accidental duplicates and consolidation candidates.
novel_features.rationale: Requires grouping every link's destination URL locally — the API returns links one at a time, not deduped.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Catches accidental duplicates that fragment analytics and waste short-link slugs.

novel_features.name: Slug-collision lint
novel_features.description: Audit short-key slugs for lookalike collisions, reserved-word violations, and brand-conflict hazards across domains.
novel_features.rationale: Pure local-data analysis — no API endpoint to ask.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Catches typo-shaped redirects and ambiguous aliases before they ship to a campaign.

novel_features.name: Bulk URL/UTM rewrite with diff
novel_features.description: Show every link that would change and the exact patch BEFORE sending. Mass UTM or domain migrations with dry-run safety.
novel_features.rationale: The API's bulk-update applies patches but doesn't preview. We diff locally first.

novel_features.name: Tag-grouped campaign dashboard
novel_features.description: Performance dashboard aggregated by tag — clicks, leads, sales rolled up across every link wearing each tag.
novel_features.rationale: Joins local taxonomy with cached analytics in one report — the API returns by-link, not by-tag-aggregate.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Campaign-level view of what's actually working without manual rollup spreadsheets.

novel_features.name: Conversion funnel attribution
novel_features.description: Click-to-lead-to-sale conversion rates per link or campaign. Surfaces where prospects drop off in the funnel.
novel_features.rationale: Joins local clicks, leads, and sales events on link_id and customer_id locally — the /track endpoints record each event in isolation.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Attribution debugging without exporting to a BI tool.

novel_features.name: Customer journey timeline
novel_features.description: See every link a customer clicked, when they became a lead, and when they purchased — in one timeline.
novel_features.rationale: Requires a join across links, events, leads, and sales keyed on customer_id — the API doesn't expose this shape.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Single-pane-of-glass attribution for one customer instead of stitching four endpoints.

novel_features.name: Partner leaderboard
novel_features.description: Rank partners by commission earned, conversion rate, and clicks generated. Find your top performers and dormant partners.
novel_features.rationale: Joins partners × commissions × clicks locally — the API returns by-resource, not as a ranked aggregate.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Partner-program health at a glance without four separate API calls.

novel_features.name: Commission audit reconciliation
novel_features.description: Reconcile partners, commissions, bounties, and payouts to flag stale rates, missing payouts, and expired bounties still earning.
novel_features.rationale: Requires a join shape only available from the local store across four resources.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Partner-program audit that would otherwise be four API calls plus a spreadsheet.

novel_features.name: Domain usage report
novel_features.description: Per-domain link count and click distribution. Surfaces over- and under-used custom domains.
novel_features.rationale: Aggregates link counts per domain locally — the API returns links and domains as separate flat lists.
novel_features.why_it_matters: See which custom domains are pulling weight before renewal time.

novel_features.name: Workspace health doctor
novel_features.description: Cross-resource Monday-morning report: rate-limit headroom, expired-but-active links, dead destination URLs, unverified domains, dormant tags.
novel_features.rationale: Aggregates state across links, domains, tags, and rate-limit headers — no single endpoint.
novel_features.why_it_matters: One command instead of five to triage workspace health.

novel_features.name: Time-windowed change feed
novel_features.description: What happened in the last N hours? Created, updated, deleted links plus partner approvals and top-clicked entities.
novel_features.rationale: Requires local timestamps on every record. The API returns by-resource, not by-time.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Powers agent 'what changed' flows without polling a dozen list endpoints.

novel_features.name: Live event tail
novel_features.description: Stream live changes by polling the API at regular intervals. Watch new clicks, leads, and sales as they happen.
novel_features.rationale: Real-time monitoring loop — different from `since` which looks backward at history.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Watch a campaign launch in real time without refreshing the dashboard.

narrative.headline: Every Dub operation, plus the local-store features no Dub tool — official or community — has ever shipped.
narrative.value_prop: Manage Dub short links, analytics, partner programs, and conversion tracking from the terminal. A local SQLite store unlocks dead-link detection, performance drift, conversion funnels, partner leaderboards, and cross-tag analytics — without burning the rate-limit budget. Every command is agent-native: --json, --select, --dry-run, typed exit codes.
narrative.auth_narrative: Dub uses workspace-scoped API keys. Get one at https://app.dub.co/settings/tokens and export it as DUB_API_KEY. The CLI checks for it on every command and `dub-pp-cli doctor` confirms the key reaches the API.

quickstart.comment: Confirm auth and reach the API
Pull links, tags, folders, domains, partners, customers into the local store
Inspect links from the local cache
See which tags drive the most clicks, leads, sales
Find dead links worth cleaning up

troubleshoots.fix: Run `dub-pp-cli doctor` to confirm DUB_API_KEY is set; refresh at https://app.dub.co/settings/tokens
Dub enforces per-second sub-limits on /analytics. The CLI honors Retry-After. Cache via `dub-pp-cli sync` and read from the local store.
Run `dub-pp-cli sync --full` to rebuild from the API.

narrative.when_to_use: Reach for this CLI when you need to audit, bulk-modify, or cross-analyze Dub assets in ways the web UI doesn't support. Especially good for campaign-wide UTM rewrites with --dry-run preview, partner-program audits, dead-link cleanup, conversion funnel attribution, and analytics queries an agent wants to compose with --json + --select.

recipes.title: Find links nobody clicks
recipes.explanation: Surfaces archive candidates from the local store with no extra API calls.

recipes.title: Audit campaign drift
recipes.explanation: Flags any link whose week-over-week click rate dropped by 30% or more.

recipes.title: Top campaigns by tag
recipes.explanation: Joins local taxonomy with analytics and narrows agent context to the columns it needs.

recipes.title: Dry-run a mass UTM rewrite
recipes.explanation: See every link that would change before sending the bulk patch.

recipes.title: Workspace Monday-morning health
recipes.explanation: One command to audit rate-limit headroom, dead destinations, and verification state.

recipes.title: Single-customer funnel timeline
recipes.explanation: Every click, lead, and sale for one customer in chronological order.
